visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long, straight dark hair is standing in a large warehouse store. She is wearing a light blue denim vest over a white long-sleeved shirt with puffy sleeves and a black skirt. She is holding a white and black rectangular box with a gold-colored bulb inside. Behind her are rows of shelving units and backpacks. The lighting is bright and industrial, typical of a large retail environment. (2) The camera zooms in on the product labels and price tags attached to the shelving. One tag clearly displays a price of $325. The surrounding area is filled with stacks of similar products, specifically 'Amaryllis Touch of Wax' boxes. The woman remains partially visible as she holds the product up for inspection. (3) The shot cuts back to the woman as she points to the instructions and illustrations on the product box. She uses animated hand gestures while speaking directly to the camera. The background shows blurred shoppers and large warehouse aisles, emphasizing the shopping context. (4) A close-up shot focuses on the back of the packaging, highlighting an icon that says '4 Weeks' next to a drawing of a red flower. The box texture appears matte with floral designs. The woman's hands are seen holding the box steady. (5) Multiple boxes are shown stacked on the shelf. The gold bulbs are visible through the plastic windows of the boxes. A hand from off-screen briefly interacts with the boxes. The shelving is metallic and industrial. (6) The woman is shown again, now smiling and gesturing towards the shelves of products. She puts a box back onto the shelf. The lighting remains consistent and bright. She appears to be concluding her presentation of the item.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 超酷新品. (2) [Subtitle]: 敢信這些東西. [Slogan]: 孤挺花蠟球. (3) [Subtitle]: 如果沒有人買. (4) [Logo]: $325. (5) [Variety]: 漂亮的華喔. (6) [Variety]: 都開了紅色的花. (7) [Slogan]: 送給需要堅強的人.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 male shoppers in the far background, and 1 male hand appearing in the foreground.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white puffy-sleeved shirt under a blue denim vest and a black long skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, featuring high metal shelves stocked with backpacks, boxes of flower bulbs, and price signage. Shoppers are occasionally visible in the distance.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, moderate-tempo lo-fi pop BGM starts, characterized by a steady synthetic drum beat and warm keyboard pads. A female voice begins speaking with a friendly, high-arousal tone, introducing a product. Background warehouse ambience is faintly audible. (2) A male voice enters, responding to the female presenter with a lower pitch and casual tone. They engage in a brief dialogue about the product's price. The BGM continues consistently underneath. (3) A soft plastic rustling sound occurs as the product packaging is handled. The female voice continues her explanation, maintaining a clear and enunciated delivery style. (4) A short 'ding' sound effect plays to emphasize a specific point about the '4 weeks' blooming time. The vocal exchange remains lively and energetic. (5) A final 'pop' sound effect marks a transition. The BGM maintains its rhythm as the conversation winds down, with the female voice remaining dominant and cheerful until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a unique and low-maintenance flower bulb product (Wax Amaryllis) available at Costco, explaining its growing process and recommending it as a thoughtful gift for the Christmas season.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct showcase of the product and its brand at a specific retail location (Costco).

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media short-form editing with bright text overlays and sound effects to maintain viewer engagement during a retail product review.
